title: May Peace Prevail On Earth International
content: The May Peace Prevail On Earth movement is a grassroots global movement to inspire, and re-awaken the inherent consciousness of love, peace and harmony.

title: Testimonials – Peace Pole Makers USA
content: "Thank you for such a beautiful peace pole. "Thanks Sue -- Thought you would like to see the product in place. We live in a community with an adjacent tribal nation (Ho-Chunk) and we have been working on several initiatives in the last few years -- the pole is a perfect object lesson that will be viewed by thousands of people over time. Thank you for providing the Peace Pole for purchase!". "My husband installed the Peace Pole this weekend that I purchased from you in August for his 70th birthday. I thought you might like to see it as it is beautifully placed in our backyard! "Thanks so much for all your help in this, it’s been a delight working with you.". ## **International Peace Pole Network** Peace Pole Makers USA is authorized by May Peace Prevail On Earth International to craft Peace Poles in the U.S. and Canada.

title: Peace Pals International - May Peace Prevail On Earth

title: 'May Peace Prevail on Earth' monument installed in Alton Baker Park
content: The four-sided wood monument is about 5 feet tall and painted white with black engravings. The engravings declare "May Peace Prevail on Earth"
